flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Vermont State University rose 25% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.0k → $15.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Vermont State University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (54.0% → 47.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Vermont State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (48.9% vs 55.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Vermont State University rose 209% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 3.6k).
